title: Ender Dragons Is Not Immune to Mob Damage│末影龍不免疫生物傷害
description: The ender dragon will take damage from any mob.│末影龍會受到任何來自生物的傷害。
body:
# Function│功能
Before installing this data pack, the ender dragon is not immune to damage from players and explosions (damage type: ```#is_explosion```); after you install this data pack, the ender dragon will not be immune to any damage from mobs and explosions.│在安裝這個資料包之前，末影龍不免疫來源於玩家的傷害以及爆炸傷害（傷害類型：```#is_explosion```）；當你安裝了這個資料包，末影龍將不免疫任何來源於生物的傷害以及爆炸傷害。
# Precautions│注意事項
The datapack achieves this effect via a custom enchantment called "immune_to_non_mob_damage", so if you see an enchanted book with the "toxin_accumulation" enchantment in your Creative Inventory, please ignore it.│該資料包透過名為"toxin_accumulation"的自訂附魔來實現此效果，因此如果您在創造模式物品欄中看到帶有"immune_to_non_mob_damage"附魔的附魔書，請忽略它。
